summary: P0/P1 Features Testing Complete: Admin Ticket Soft-Delete, SLA Policy Templates tab, and Logo pulse animation fix all verified. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.

minor.issue: OrderResponse model was missing deleted fields (deleted, deleted_at, deleted_by_name, deletion_reason) - FIXED during testing

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/orders/{id} returns order with deleted fields
Backend: DELETE /api/orders/{id} soft-deletes order with reason
Backend: GET /api/orders/deleted/list returns deleted orders with all fields
Backend: POST /api/orders/{id}/restore restores deleted order
Backend: Soft-delete requires non-empty reason (validation)
Backend: Cannot delete already deleted order (400 error)
Backend: Cannot restore non-deleted order (400 error)
Backend: GET /api/sla-policies returns policies list
Backend: GET /api/sla-policies/monitoring/stats returns stats
Backend: GET /api/sla-policies/monitoring/at-risk returns at-risk orders
Backend: GET /api/sla-policies/monitoring/breached returns breached orders
Backend: GET /api/sla-policies/monitoring/history returns escalation history
Backend: GET /api/roles returns roles for SLA templates
Backend: GET /api/teams returns teams for SLA templates
Backend: GET /api/specialties returns specialties for SLA templates
Backend: GET /api/access-tiers returns access tiers for SLA templates
Frontend: Admin can see 'Deleted Tickets' link in sidebar
Frontend: Deleted Tickets page loads with data-testid='deleted-tickets-page'
Frontend: SLA Policies page has Templates tab with data-testid='templates-tab'
Frontend: Templates tab shows 6 pre-configured SLA templates with 'Use Template' buttons
Frontend: Logo in sidebar does NOT have pulse animation (class='relative' not 'animate-pulse')
Frontend: Delete Ticket button visible on Order Detail page for Admin
Frontend: Delete dialog opens with reason input (data-testid='delete-reason-input')
Frontend: Confirm delete redirects to orders page
Frontend: Deleted ticket appears in Deleted Tickets page with View/Restore buttons
Frontend: Restore dialog shows ticket details and deletion reason
Frontend: Restore removes ticket from deleted list
Frontend: Non-admin users do NOT see 'Deleted Tickets' link in sidebar
Frontend: Non-admin users redirected away from /deleted-tickets route
critical_code_review_comments: OrderResponse model updated to include deleted fields (deleted, deleted_at, deleted_by_name, deletion_reason)
normalize_order() helper updated to include deleted fields
Layout.js correctly restricts 'Deleted Tickets' nav item to Administrator role only
App.js correctly protects /deleted-tickets route with roles=['Administrator']
OrderDetail.js correctly shows Delete button only when canSoftDelete (isAdmin && !order.deleted)
DeletedTickets.js correctly displays deleted tickets with View/Restore actions
SLAPolicies.js has Templates tab with 6 pre-configured policy templates
Logo in Layout.js uses subtle glow effect (bg-white/20 blur-sm) instead of animate-pulse
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/orders.py - Added deleted fields to OrderResponse model
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test order RRG-000079 (0b28908e-9f67-49bd-a9dd-341429a2f2b5)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0/P1 features verified: 1) Admin Ticket Soft-Delete - DELETE /api/orders/{id} with reason, GET /api/orders/deleted/list, POST /api/orders/{id}/restore all working. Frontend has Delete button on Order Detail (Admin only), Deleted Tickets page with View/Restore. 2) SLA Policy Templates - Templates tab on SLA Policies page shows 6 pre-configured templates (Standard 24h, Urgent 4h, Business Hours 8h, Premium 2h, Extended 72h, First Response 1h) with 'Use Template' buttons. 3) Logo pulse animation removed - now uses subtle glow effect. Non-admin users correctly blocked from Delete button and Deleted Tickets page.

p0_soft_delete_ticket.description: Admin can soft-delete tickets with mandatory reason from Order Detail page

p0_deleted_tickets_page.description: Deleted tickets appear in /deleted-tickets page (Admin only) with View/Restore actions

p0_restore_ticket.description: Admin can restore deleted tickets from Deleted Tickets page

p0_non_admin_access_control.description: Non-admin users cannot see Delete button or access Deleted Tickets page

p1_sla_templates_tab.description: SLA Policies page has Templates tab with 6 pre-configured templates

p1_use_template_buttons.description: Each template has 'Use Template' button that opens policy dialog with pre-filled values

p1_logo_animation_fix.description: Logo in sidebar no longer has constant pulse animation - uses subtle glow effect

mocked_apis.note: GHL Payment webhook is still mocked as per previous context
